jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Awfis - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Awfis, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Awfis:
Awfis is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Awfis!
